summary: iter178 testing complete - Emergent Google OAuth + MySchedule Social Feed features fully working. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: GoogleAuthPill renders correctly in top-right, PanelLayoutToolbar (Tile/Cascade) present, MySchedule panel loads with employee picker and social feed section showing cross-department celebrations.
test_credentials: Session tokens created in MongoDB luccca_enterprise: session_marcus_1776558009425 (with employee_match), test_session_1776557986266 (no employee_match). See /app/memory/test_credentials.md for details.
seed_data_creation: Created auth_users and auth_sessions records for testing. Updated Marcus H. employee with email marcus.h@pier-sixty-six.com for employee_match testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter178 adds Emergent Google OAuth (auth_emergent.py) with /api/auth/session, /api/auth/me, /api/auth/logout endpoints. GoogleAuthPill component renders top-right with data-testid='auth-sign-in-btn'. MySchedule panel now includes company_feed (cross-department celebrations) in addition to team_celebrations. Employee auto-resolve works via /api/auth/me returning employee_match when auth_users.email matches employees.email case-insensitively. Test sessions stored in auth_users + auth_sessions collections in MongoDB.

mocked_apis.note: Emergent session-data endpoint (external) is real - invalid session_id returns 401 as expected

features_tested.auth_logout_idempotent: PASS - POST /api/auth/logout returns 200 even with no session
features_tested.auth_me_with_bearer_token: PASS - GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer returns user + employee_match
features_tested.employee_match_case_insensitive: PASS - employee_match resolves when emails match case-insensitively
features_tested.employee_match_null_when_no_match: PASS - employee_match returns null when no matching employee
features_tested.my_schedule_company_feed: PASS - GET /api/my-schedule/employee/{id} returns company_feed with cross-department celebrations
features_tested.company_feed_structure: PASS - company_feed entries have {date, name, kind, years, department}
features_tested.company_feed_excludes_self: PASS - company_feed excludes the requesting employee's milestones
features_tested.team_celebrations_same_dept: PASS - team_celebrations only includes same-department milestones
features_tested.frontend_google_auth_pill: PASS - GoogleAuthPill renders with data-testid='auth-sign-in-btn' in top-right (x=1811, y=12)
features_tested.frontend_my_schedule_panel: PASS - MySchedule panel loads with employee picker and social feed section
